flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of La Verne rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($25.6k → $29.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of La Verne rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.8k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of La Verne fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
